apps.title: Word Stories: Word Puzzle Game
apps.summary:
Discover Word Stories, a word puzzle game where each word you find reveals hidden objects and completes a beautiful picture! Watch simple scenes turn into colorful illustrations as every correct word adds new details and brings the image to life.

The gameplay feels relaxing and rewarding, combining visual discovery with engaging word puzzle mechanics, making it a great choice for fans of word games.

Looking for a calm way to stay sharp without pressure? This word game gives you a quiet escape from everyday noise while helping improve your focus and vocabulary. If you enjoy thoughtful word games for adults, you’ll appreciate how each level turns simple actions into a satisfying outcome. Progress feels smooth, as every solved word adds something clear and visible. Complete word puzzles and watch the story unfold as new details appear and fill the scene!

How to play Word Stories:

• Complete the picture by forming words from the letters in the wheel.
• Look at the scene and use empty letter slots as clues for missing objects.
• Connect letters to create words that match the objects in the picture.
• Each correct word reveals new objects instantly in the scene.
• Earn useful boosters like hints and wheel shuffle.
• Complete all words to finish the scene and see the full story come together.

If you’re exploring free word games for adults, this one stands out with its visual storytelling and calm, steady pace!

Why you'll love Word Stories:

✔ A relaxing word puzzle game with simple rules and clear, satisfying progress.
✔ Smooth word connect mechanics that make it easy to find words and keep the flow going.
✔ A wide range of levels across different settings, each built around unique word puzzles with its own story.
✔ A fresh take on word search and word find gameplay, enhanced with a visual twist.
✔ No pressure, no rush — play at your own pace and enjoy every step of the process.
✔ A balanced mix of challenge and relaxation that keeps you coming back to this word puzzle game daily.
✔ A great choice for players who enjoy word games and want something more engaging than classic formats.

Play Word Stories, form words to reveal every hidden object, and enjoy a calm and satisfying journey through colorful scenes!

EULA: https://easybrain.com/terms.html
Privacy Policy: https://easybrain.com/policy.html

apps.title: End of Winter
apps.summary:
The magic tower of the North, the source of the endless winter… Also known as the 『Tower of Winter』, it has finally fallen, thanks to the sacrifices of countless expedition members and the valiant efforts of an unknown hero.

However, what humanity faced was not a hopeful future. As the end of winter approached, the massive horde of the Undead—drawn to the barren lands of the North by the Tower—began to spread across the entire continent.

Confronted by this great migration of the dead even before the cold had fully retreated, the mortal races were plunged into an unprecedented era of struggle, without even a moment to share the joy of survival.

Clinging to a slim chance of life at the tail end of the long winter, each race must now prove their worth one last time through a desperate, life-or-death struggle.

Winter is fading.
Now, as countless heroes rise and fall…
What will you fight for, and how will you be remembered?


◆ A New Text RPG from the Creators of Tower of Winter and Phantom City ◆
The masters of text-based roguelikes have returned with an original dark fantasy zombie apocalypse universe.

◆ Deepened Strategy to Freely Weave Your Destiny ◆
Collect and combine various starting cards within the game to build your ultimate starting deck and forge your own destiny.

◆ Massive Hordes of the Undead Ravage the Continent ◆
A world far more expansive than its predecessors and a relentlessly harsh environment will push your survival skills to the absolute limit.

◆ Diverse Lives in an Era of Chaos ◆
With rich content including dozens of unique death scenes and multiple endings, you can experience a completely new adventure in every single run.

apps.title: The Division Resurgence
apps.summary:
Become a Division agent, the last line of defense after society collapses.

Explore a shared open world set in New York City, featuring iconic locations and playable solo or fully in co-op.
Complete more than 100 world activities as you restore order and uncover an exclusive, canon storyline that reveals a plot threatening the entire city — and beyond. Loot, mod, and customize a wide variety of weapons and gear, along with skins and cosmetics, to build your perfect agent and grow stronger.

Customize your agent and choose a specialization that fits your playstyle — from tanky Bulwarks to high-firepower Demolitionists. Each specialization features unique skills and powerful ultimate abilities, letting you adapt your role at any time while unlocking new talents in your skill tree.

Protect civilians from dangerous factions, such as the Cleaners who want to burn everything down, or the Rikers driven by greed, as you fight back against the chaos spreading across the city.

Engage in intense PVE combat, competitive PVP modes, and enter the iconic Dark Zone PvPvE experience, where high-risk encounters lead to high-end rewards — if you can extract them.

The Division Resurgence is designed as a living game, with regular additional content expanding the story, the world, and the challenges ahead.

apps.title: Hungry Balls
apps.summary:
Hungry for a Challenge? Hungry Balls! 🎯

Dive into Hungry Balls, the devouringly fun puzzle game where you erase sand to guide your character and eat all the green creatures! A perfect mix of physics puzzles and logic brain teasers.

Features That Will Hook You:
🧠 FEED YOUR BRAIN: Solve clever physics-based puzzles that test your logic, strategy, and IQ. It's the ultimate brain training exercise!
⚡ SMART ERASING ACTION: Strategically remove sand to control the flow of the level. One smart erase can cause a delicious chain reaction!
🏆 HUNDREDS OF TASTY LEVELS: A huge variety of challenging stages + bonus levels to unlock. New levels are added regularly to keep you entertained!
🎯 EASY TO LEARN, FUN TO MASTER: Simple one-touch controls make it easy to play, but the clever puzzles will keep you hooked for hours.
😋 FUN & SATISFYING GAMEPLAY: Experience the satisfying feeling of planning the perfect move and watching your character eat them all! A perfect game to relax and unwind.

Ready to Erase, Solve, and Eat?
Download Hungry Balls: Brain Teasers for FREE and start your puzzle adventure today!

Introducing a survival-of-the-fittest idle RPG!
Step into the world of Animal Busters, where you grow stronger just by letting it run!

■ Auto Growth? Auto Battle!
An upgraded idle RPG with Busters-level battling and growth!
Enjoy a grow-your-characters game with auto-hunting and full auto-battle!

Now stranded at the edge of the continent, your true journey begins. Embark on an adventure RPG to rebuild your strength and seek revenge.

apps.title: Netflix Playground
apps.summary:
NETFLIX MEMBERSHIP REQUIRED. AD-FREE, UNLIMITED ACCESS FOR NETFLIX MEMBERS.

Explore a welcoming world of games just right for young kids and toddlers. Preschool and kindergarten-age children can play with favorite characters from Dr. Seuss, solve puzzles on Sesame Street and more.

Welcome to "Netflix Playground," a central home for magical moments with your kids' favorite characters. Play and learn with a colorful collection of fun, enriching and toddler-friendly games and activities for kids, including children in preschool and kindergarten. Explore the jungle with Horton and Samson, make sticker scenes with StoryBots, color pictures of familiar friends or bake a cake with Peppa the Pig — among many other possibilities.

Everything is included in your Netflix membership, with no in-game ads or extra fees, for peace of mind while kids play. You can find these minigames in the Playground now, with more to come:

🩷 PLAYTIME WITH PEPPA PIG 🩷
Jump into Peppa's world with a collection of playful activities. Care for guinea pigs, drive the bus, make a smoothie and more.

🩵 SESAME STREET 🩵
Hang out with Elmo, Big Bird, Cookie Monster, Oscar and more beloved puppet pals. Practice matching with memory cards or coordination with connect-the-dots.

🩶 DR. SEUSS'S HORTON! 🩶
Explore vibrant jungle environments that encourage creativity through cause-and-effect play with Horton and friends. Try skateboarding and basketball, too!

🧡 STORYBOTS 🧡
Have fun with these curious and inquisitive critters through colorful sticker book scenes, jigsaw puzzles and more activities.

💛 DR. SEUSS'S THE SNEETCHES 💛
Join Stella Sneetch on interactive adventures through her world, choose shapes to develop pattern recognition and build a one-of-a-kind car.

💚 BAD DINOSAURS 💚
Pick a tiny Tyrannosaurus to run on a race track, or jam out with a turntable, keyboard and sound effects to make a fart-filled new song.

❤️ DR. SEUSS'S RED FISH, BLUE FISH 💙
Tap and drag to reveal delightful surprises in the fishes' living room and kitchen play zones, or soar through the air in a hot air balloon.

💜 LET'S COLOR 💜
Unleash your creativity with coloring pages featuring favorite characters from "Netflix Playground."

Please note that the Data Safety information applies to information collected and used in this app. See the Netflix Privacy Statement to learn more about information we collect and use in this and other contexts, including at account registration.

- Rising lava survival gameplay

- Collect Brainrots across levels
- Unlock speed and survival upgrades
- Fast rounds with simple controls

apps.title: Word Solitaire
apps.summary:
Word Solitaire is a clever blend of card strategy and word discovery. It's not your usual word game — here, you'll match ideas, uncover connections, and build meaning chains to clear the board. Relax, think, and play your way through hundreds of challenging levels that twist the classic solitaire formula into something totally fresh.

A New Kind of Word Challenge
What happens when solitaire meets the art of finding hidden connections?
Each level starts with a few cards on the table and a full deck waiting to be revealed.
Draw cards one by one, find the right categories, and place matching words in their proper spots. Just like solitaire, smart planning matters — one misplaced card can change everything.

How to Play:
- Tap to draw cards from the deck.
- Place category cards first to create a foundation.
- Add all related word cards to complete the group.
- Clear all stacks to win the level.

It's simple to learn but deeply satisfying to master.

Why You'll Enjoy It:
- A relaxing mix of solitaire logic and word connection puzzles
- Hundreds of handcrafted levels full of clever links and surprises
- No timers, no rush — play at your own pace
- Smooth design and rewarding progression
- Ideal for fans of word, logic, and card games

Play in Your Language
Word Solitaire is now available in multiple languages — switch the game to the one that feels most natural to you:
🇫🇷 French · 🇩🇪 German · 🇪🇸 Spanish · 🇷🇺 Russian · 🇵🇹 Portuguese · 🇹🇷 Turkish · 🇯🇵 Japanese · 🇰🇷 Korean
One game, endless languages — for players all around the world.

Train Your Brain, One Word at a Time
Every match you make sharpens your reasoning and vocabulary. Think outside the box, spot the hidden connection, and feel that "aha" moment with every correct pairing.

What Players Are Saying
"Brilliant combination of cards and words. Totally addictive."
"Perfect balance of thinking and relaxing — my new favorite puzzle."
"So satisfying when you find the hidden link."

Whether you love word games, card games, or brain teasers, Word Solitaire delivers the best of all worlds. It's clever, calm, and endlessly replayable.

apps.title: Rap Star:Idle Clicker
apps.summary:
Every legend begins with a single beat. In Rap Star: Idle Clicker, you don’t just play a game—you live a life. This is a deep life simulator that puts the mic in your hand and the weight of your ambition on your shoulders. Start as a nobody on the block, spitting rhymes for pocket change, and climb your way to superstardom. Every choice, every tap, every track shapes your destiny.



Tap to Build Your Hustle

The journey begins with rhythm. Tap to freestyle on street corners, battle rivals, and earn your first dollars. The core gameplay is instantly satisfying—each tap fills your pocket and builds your reputation. But true success comes from smart growth. Invest in better studios, hire top‑tier producers, and unlock signature flows that set you apart. Even when you’re offline, your grind continues with rewarding idle mechanics. Come back to collect stacks of cash, watch your fanbase explode, and keep pushing forward.



Build Your Empire, Define Your Reign

This isn’t just about making hits—it’s about building an empire. Start from a tiny home studio, then expand to a world‑class recording complex. Own record labels, launch fashion lines, and sign rising stars under your wing. Your reigns over the industry are shaped by the decisions you make: stay true to your roots or embrace the commercial spotlight? Each choice affects your reputation, your relationships, and the way fans see you. Will you be remembered as a raw lyricist or a global icon?



Go Viral and Conquer the World

In today’s music scene, going viral is everything. Drop singles that ignite social media feeds, create music videos that break the internet, and watch your name trend across the global charts. Collaborate with world‑class artists, perform at sold‑out arenas, and become the name on everyone’s playlist. Your influence grows beyond music—you become a cultural influencer, with brands lining up for endorsements and fans hanging on your every post.



Feel the Hype, Master the ClickClaps

The stage is where legends are made. When you perform, you’ll feel the hype of the crowd pressing against you. Master the clickclaps rhythm mini‑game to ignite the audience—time your taps perfectly to amplify your energy and boost your rewards. Every successful show adds to your momentum, giving you the rush of climbing higher and higher. The bigger the hype, the faster your star rises.



Features That Make You a Star

1.Addictive Idle Clicker Core – Tap to earn, upgrade to earn more, and watch your fortune grow even while you’re away.

2.Deep Life Simulator Mechanics – Shape your personality, manage relationships, and navigate the highs and lows of fame.

3.Empire Building – Own studios, labels, and businesses. Expand your influence beyond music.

4.Go Viral & Global Domination – Release tracks that spread like wildfire and top charts around the world.

5.Interactive Performances – Use the clickclaps rhythm game to maximize hype and earn exclusive rewards.

6.Social Media & Influencer System – Manage your online presence, respond to trends, and grow your following like a real influencer.

7.Authentic Hip‑Hop Atmosphere – From underground cyphers to stadium tours, feel every step of the journey.

8.Endless Upgrades & Customization – Studios, vehicles, outfits, and entourages—everything can be leveled up to match your status.



Your Legacy Awaits

No dream is too big, and no start is too small. Rap Star: Idle Clicker gives you the tools, the grind, and the glory. It’s more than a game—it’s your shot at becoming a legend. So grab the mic, feel the beat, and start writing your story. The world is waiting to hear your voice.

apps.title: Paint by Number: Coloring Game
apps.summary:
Paint by Number: Coloring Game (PBN) is an internationally popular coloring and puzzle game that has attracted over 100 million users of all ages. This immersive coloring game serves as a gateway from everyday life into an imaginative world of art expression and color. Each of the 30,000+ coloring pictures is crafted by talented artists worldwide, who passionately create high-quality masterpieces across diverse categories including fantasy, nature, animals, and geometric patterns. This drawing game's simple number-guided approach transforms blank canvases into vibrant works of art with beautiful colour, making it the perfect creative escape for anyone seeking both relaxation and artistic fulfillment. 🎉

Looking to relax with a fun and creative coloring game? Paint by Number offers:
★ Diverse Themes: Explore magical worlds, serene landscapes, and intricate patterns while enjoying a unique coloring experience with vibrant colour. ✨
★ Artistic Journey: Color fairytale scenes, natural beauty, and mandalas to create stunning pictures full of vibrant color. 🔍
★ Mindful Experience: Relax, unwind, and find inner calm through the soothing and therapeutic act of coloring in this engaging drawing game. 🌊

Why choose Paint by Number?

🏞️ INSPIRING ARTWORKS 🏞️
☆ Premium Resources: PBN collaborates with highly talented, creative artists from around the world who are deeply passionate about their art. Their dedication ensures the coloring pictures in the game is a high-quality colour masterpiece that inspires your creativity and love for drawing game. 📖
☆ Diverse Styles: Explore a rich collection of coloring artworks that span various artistic genres, themes, and styles. This drawing game brings together diverse cultural influences and aesthetics to make your coloring journey exciting and unique. Enjoy this drawing game! 🌍

🎨 UNIQUE COLORING GAMEPLAY 🎨
☆ Story-Driven Coloring: Experience a perfect blend of storytelling and coloring as vibrant colors bring characters to life. Dive into the immersive stories, where each stroke of color adds joy while exploring meaningful tales of growth. 🌵
☆ Collection Events: Level up your coloring game with fun picture-searching challenges! Unlock exclusive pictures as you color and collect, enjoying the excitement of discovery and the satisfaction of completing your colorful collection. 🖼️

🖌️ OUTSTANDING USER EXPERIENCE 🖌️
☆ Easy Coloring: Effortlessly bring your creations to life with colour. Just tap the screen, and let the vibrant color flow, making amazing art pictures in minutes. 🍁
☆ Immersive Experience: Enjoy a relaxing process of coloring, where each stroke of color offers tranquility and engaging colour escape. 🌟
☆ User-Friendly Design: Enjoy seamless coloring with a stable, secure app and an intuitive interface designed for every coloring enthusiast. 📱

Begin your coloring adventure with Paint by Number today! Download now to unlock a world of colour art in this relaxing drawing game. Whether you're seeking a moment of calm, creative expression, or simply the joy of color, Paint by Number offers the perfect escape. Join our community of millions of coloring enthusiasts and transform ordinary moments into extraordinary masterpieces. Let your creativity flow and experience the magic of a truly remarkable coloring game! 🎨 💫

Contact us at support@oakevergames.com

apps.title: Immortal Celestial Fate
apps.summary:
From the moment your spirit roots awaken to the perfection of the Nascent Soul, every moment of idle cultivation is a gentle echo of the Dao, responding to unwavering determination.

A group of 21st-century Earth travelers, on a graduation trip, accidentally venture deep into the world’s highest mountain range. There, they discover a hidden Immortal Realm—and are unexpectedly drawn into this higher plane of existence.

After a brief loss of consciousness, you slowly awaken to find yourself in an unfamiliar world. Your companions have vanished without a trace, leaving behind a quiet sense of loss.
As the group’s leader, you make a choice—to embark on a journey across the Immortal Realm in search of your missing allies.

As you familiarize yourself with your surroundings and calm your mind to sense the changes within your body, excitement begins to surge.
Your body overflows with power, as if it holds endless strength. A light jump sends you three meters into the air and five meters forward.
If this were Earth, wouldn’t every track-and-field world record be yours?

Regaining your composure, you press onward—only to stumble into a hidden valley barrier, where you uncover a mysterious and profound arcane scripture…

Chaos looms over the Immortal Realm.
You step onto the path of destiny.
Countless Daos collide—who will rise above all?

And so, the story begins.

In this vast cultivation world, you can refine pills, forge equipment, cultivate in seclusion, temper meridians, master cultivation techniques and formations, and collect and nurture Artifacts, Dharma Bodies, Divine Beasts, Spirit Companions, Ancestral Sigils, and Exotic Flames.
You may also recruit companions or Dao partners, venture through the Immortal Realm, and forge an age of prosperity.

Fans Page:
https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61586503716781

Discord Community:
https://discord.gg/vduzbVDZwx

apps.title: Cool Lady
apps.summary:
Cool Lady is an easy-to-pick-up puzzle adventure game. Navigate through rooms filled with traps and mechanisms, and help the character safely reach the exit.

Move Pins, Avoid Traps
Each room is packed with items and monsters. Move pins to change the terrain, use props wisely to avoid danger, and plan a safe path to the exit. The controls are simple, but the later levels will challenge your observation and imagination.

Freely Switch Character Skins
Multiple male and female character skins are available in the game and can be unlocked as you progress. Change your character’s outfit anytime and enjoy a fresh look every time you play.

Earn Rewards Through Tasks
Complete daily missions, medal leagues, and other activities to collect coins and cash rewards. Once you accumulate enough, you can withdraw them to your personal account. Play a few rounds in your spare time and you might earn a pleasant little bonus along the way.

apps.title: Skullburn
apps.summary:
Skullburn is a cool mix of wilderness survival and action adventure in one unrivaled experience. In this post apocalyptic world, you must break things around for scrap metal, upgrade your skull crusher vehicles, and win every gang fight to survive. Experience the ultimate wasteland punk atmosphere where the scorched earth dictates the rules of apocalypse survival games.

A world that once thrived suddenly became a lawless territory after the apocalypse max event. All residents disappeared, and our main character needs to solve the mystery of the scorched earth. However, challenges and various wasteland punk factions will appear in the way, so the main goal is wilderness survival in these intense apocalypse survival games.

🏜️ EXPLORE THE SCORCHED EARTH

Explore the abandoned places of Skullburn to find out why the world turned into a lawless desert. Meet the scary details of post apocalyptic life: scrap metal piles, desert war zones, and unusual wasteland punk raiders watching you. To master wilderness survival, you must explore every corner of this action adventure.

🪓 APOCALYPSE SURVIVAL GAMES WITH CRAFT

Break things around you for resources and scrap metal. The better your skull crusher weapons, the easier it will be to ensure your wilderness survival in these dangerous apocalypse survival games. In this post apocalyptic world, crafting is your only way to survive the apocalypse max chaos.

🚗 DESERT WAR VEHICLES

Build the ultimate skull crusher to win the desert war! When changing locations in this action adventure, you will face a deadly gang fight on wheels. Use scrap metal to reinforce your ride and dominate the lawless roads of the scorched earth. Your skull crusher is your home in this wasteland punk reality.

👤 BECOME THE WASTELAND PUNK LEGEND

Pistol, machine gun, or a heavy skull crusher? Choose your weapon from a devastating arsenal of this action adventure. Use different fighting styles to win every gang fight and prove you are the king of wilderness survival. This post apocalyptic world respects only power.

🚧 CLEAR POST APOCALYPTIC RAIDS

Go on dangerous raids for scrap metal and rare resources. Each raid is a unique challenge in the apocalypse max era! Locations with enemies at every turn await you. Only by winning a gang fight can you secure your shelter and solve the mystery of the scorched earth.

👫 SAVE OTHER SURVIVORS

In this post apocalyptic RPG, it is important to join forces. Save other survivors from a lawless gang and protect them from the desert war dangers. Go with them for scrap metal and hunt for bosses in the best tradition of action games. Together, you can survive the apocalypse max nightmare.

🌵 PREPARE FOR THE GANG FIGHT

In Skullburn: Action Adventure, when the sun goes down over the scorched earth, you will need all your wilderness survival skills to escape from wasteland punk mutants. Prepare your skull crusher and gather your ammo for the most intense desert war of your life.

👁️‍🗨️️ SOLVE THE LAWLESS MYSTERY

Search for clues to learn the history of this post apocalyptic wasteland. Find out what triggered the apocalypse max and why the desert war never ends. In these adventure, every letter found on the scorched earth brings you closer to the truth.

In Skullburn: Post Apocalyptic survival, every moment is a desperate struggle to maintain your wilderness survival. Explore the scorched earth and lawless ruins in one of the most intense apocalypse survival games and action adventure titles. Win every gang fight, upgrade your skull crusher, and collect scrap metal to stay alive. Every mile of the desert war hides new wasteland punk dangers in this apocalypse max world.

Skullburn is a free-to-play action adventure where every piece of scrap metal matters. Test your courage in one of the most chilling apocalypse survival games. Only the bravest will manage wilderness survival in this post apocalyptic world of wasteland punk and desert war.

apps.title: Word Sort Fun!
apps.summary:
Word Sort Fun! – When Word Puzzles Meets Fun Sort Games! Play word games mixed with strategic solitaire games. Sort and match words in satisfying puzzles. From exciting words connecting challenges to relaxing solitaire card games, every level is designed for a quick break or your daily brain workout!

🌟 Features of Word Sort Fun! 🌟
- Thousands of creative word puzzles that boost logic and vocabulary.
- An innovative blend of word solitaire associations and clever word puzzles.
- Fun card game with no timers – play at your own pace.
- Every decision counts – just like in classic solitaire card games.
- Offline mode – enjoy your favorite word solitaire card games anytime, anywhere.

🔍 How to Play Word Sort Fun!🔍
1. Place category cards to set the stage.
2. Draw words or image cards from the deck.
3. Win by clearing the board before running out of moves.
4. Apply solitaire association skills to organize all cards correctly.

🎯 Why Choose Word Sort Fun? 🎯
- Solve fun and tricky word connect puzzles.
- Explore unique solitaire associations mechanics.
- Master strategic thinking with word solitaire games.
- Perfect for all ages and skill levels — enjoy fun and relaxation anytime.

Download Word Sort Fun now! Enjoy the journey of word associations and solitaire games. Relax and train your mind with thousands of free and satisfying word solitaire puzzles today!

apps.title: Subway Surfers City
apps.summary:
Billions of players can’t be wrong - run and jump back into the beloved world of Subway Surfers and rediscover your favorite endless running adventure with exciting new twists. Progress through fresh hurdles, reach new heights, and collect new characters!

Jake, Tricky, Fresh, and Yutani are ready - are you? Play Subway Surfers City now!

Key features:
- CHOOSE YOUR ADVENTURE: Switch seamlessly between thrilling endless runs chasing a new high score, or playing the all new City Tour!
- UNCOVER SECRETS: Stomp and jump for a new way to play this runner game. Reach new depths and heights as you discover hard-to-reach Secret Stars!
- COLLECT AND UPGRADE SURFERS & BOARDS: Each Surfer and Board has unique abilities, so upgrade and combine runners and boards to play your way! Collect them all, find Surfer and Board tokens to upgrade them all and build the strongest Crew!
- WIN WITH NEW POWER-UPS & PERKS: Pick up new power-ups for the most powerful runs. Bubblegum shields you, batteries superpower your hoverboard, and drones get you to the highest points of Subway City!
- UNLOCK LIVELY DISTRICTS: Explore all the secret corners of Subway City while running away from Guard and Dog. Earn XP to unlock new Districts!
- COMPLETE MISSIONS AND WIN REWARDS: The crew needs you to run your best! Play smart and finish missions to unlock new items and win big.
- CONQUER TRIALS: Are you ready to have your running skills challenged? Trials are adrenaline-pumping, limited runs that require your best performance to get the best rewards.
- PLAY OFFLINE: Subway Surfers City is available offline! Play without wifi or internet connection. Access to some features will be limited.

Download Subway Surfers City now and play for free! Some in-game items can also be purchased for real money.

apps.title: Hello, Yoshi!
apps.summary:
"Hello, Yoshi!" Are you ready to play? With this free application from the little-kid-friendly My Mario brand, you and your kiddo can play with Yoshi's face and delight in all his various expressions.

■Make Silly Faces
Team up with your kiddo to see how silly Yoshi can get when you pull and stretch his face or take turns poking and spinning him around. Tap on the ? Block in the top-left corner of the screen and select an icon to make items—like a Super Mushroom, a Super Star, or pipes—and even enemies appear alongside Yoshi.

■Peekaboo!
Invite Yoshi to play peekaboo by tapping on the leftmost icon in the ? Block menu. Boo may even make a guest appearance!

■Built-In Breaks
Good night, Yoshi! Yoshi gets tuckered out after playing for a while and will fall fast asleep. At that point no amount of poking can wake him up! This is a great opportunity to take a break and help parents limit their child's screen time. If you want to keep the fun going, you can turn off this feature by tapping the gear icon in the top-right corner of the screen when the application starts.

■Play Offline
There's no need to be connected to the internet to play this application. After you download it, you're good to go!

Operation is not guaranteed for all devices that meet the operating conditions. It may not work properly depending on the device's performance and specifications, device-specific application usage conditions, etc.

Please be sure to read the Health and Safety information provided in the application settings before you start playing. Settings can be accessed by tapping the gear icon in the top-right corner of the screen when the application starts to access the menu.

Terms of Service:
https://support.nintendo.com/jp/legal-notes/my-mario-eula-selector

©Nintendo

apps.title: Letter Tile Match - Word Games
apps.summary:
Letter Tile Match is a word puzzle game that combines classic word-building with match mechanics. Form words from letter tiles to break obstacles and complete level goals in a limited number of moves. Each correct word you submit removes tiles from the board, clears nearby objects, and opens space for new letter tiles to fall from above.

In this word game, the aim is to build real words using the letters on the board. The selected letter tiles disappear, obstacles next to and beneath them break, and the grid refills with new tiles. Every move changes the board and creates new opportunities to find words and clear space with the reaction caused by a tile match.

Letter Tile Match blends classic word puzzle games with the strategy of matching games. Plan each move carefully, choose words that clear maximum space, and meet your objective before you run out of moves. This matching game rewards smart decisions and analytical play. Inspired by the word search genre and word connect games, this free word game for adults offers a fresh take on puzzle gameplay with tile matching.

How to play this letter game

• The goal of this word puzzle is to meet level objectives within a limited number of moves.
• Look at the board and find words using the available letter tiles.
• Tap Submit to remove the selected letter tiles from the grid.
• Obstacles next to removed letters break, and ice beneath the tiles cracks.
• New letter tiles fall from above and create new opportunities to make a tile match.
• Longer words unlock boosters and help clear difficult sections of the board.
• You can't pass a level if you run out of moves before meeting the goal.

How to master this letter-matching game

• Look for longer words that will clear more tiles and free up space on the board.
• Target concentrated groups of obstacles so that one word can break several objects in one go.
• Save simple words for later when you might need a safe move to finish the level.
• Plan ahead and make every move count in this strategic matching game.

Letter Tile Match combines relaxing word games for adults with the satisfying mechanics of match games and tile match puzzles. Matching games for adults and thoughtful word puzzles come together in this game to create a calm and rewarding challenge.

Play Letter Tile Match to find words, solve various levels, and train your brain with engaging word puzzle games.

Terms of Use:
https://easybrain.com/terms

Privacy Policy:
https://easybrain.com/privacy

apps.title: Last Furry: Survival
apps.summary:
A cataclysmic conspiracy has released toxic fog over the once-vibrant planet Furry, plunging it into apocalyptic chaos. Many have perished, while others mutated into savage monsters. The remaining survivors now fight for their lives in this toxic wasteland — with scarce resources, suffocating air, and relentless beast attacks.

As Commander, YOU are destined to lead these survivors. Your strategic prowess and unyielding courage will be crucial in establishing a shelter, purifying the land, and combating the spreading toxic fog. Rally your people to rebuild civilization from the ashes and conquer the ultimate survival challenge!

[Game Features]

BUILD & MANAGE YOUR SHELTER
Transform ruins into a thriving refuge! Every decision counts—manage food supplies, purify toxic air, provide medical care, and fortify against threats. Your strategic planning and resource management will decide if your shelter flourishes or falls under the toxic fog.

LIVING, BREATHING SURVIVORS
Each survivor brings unique emotions, backstories, and personalities to your shelter. They'll show joy when comfortable, despair when hungry, and gratitude when protected. Through personal letters and dynamic interactions, you'll resolve conflicts, earn loyalty, and create unbreakable bonds with those you protect.

HIGH-STAKES EXPLORATION
Venture beyond safety into the toxic unknown! Lead squads to gather vital resources and salvage forgotten technologies. But beware—mutated beasts and hostile factions lurk in the toxic fog, making every exploration a high-risk, high-reward venture.

RECRUIT TALENTED HEROES
Find and recruit remarkable heroes with unique abilities! Build an elite team of specialists—fearsome warriors who excel in combat, brilliant engineers who boost development, and mysterious figures with powers that can change fate itself. Upgrade their gear, enhance their skills, and unleash their full potential!

FORM POWERFUL ALLIANCE
Survival requires unity! Create alliances to trade essential resources, share critical intelligence, and stand together against formidable threats. Join forces with other Commanders to push back the toxic fog and reclaim your broken world.

ENDLESS CHALLENGES
Encounter constantly evolving threats that demand your leadership! Plan explorations, develop purification strategies, issue impactful decrees, and tackle unexpected crises. Every decision shapes not just survival, but the future of civilization itself.

The toxic fog still chokes the land, but hope refuses to die.

Commander, will you lead humanity into a new dawn?

Download now and fight for the future!

Every pitch, hit, and home run feels authentic with lifelike motion-captured animation, realistic baseball physics, and stats based on real-life MLBPI superstars. Whether you’re chasing a clutch hit, the intensity of 9 innings, throwing strikes in Pitching Ace, or crushing moonshots in Homerun King, every swing and pitch delivers that big-league adrenaline.

Recruit and upgrade over 800 official MLBPI baseball superstars! Featuring cover athlete Cal Raleigh, the switch-hitting home run force, alongside five-tool dynamo José Ramírez, generational slugger Juan Soto, power pitcher strikeout ace Tarik Skubal, lightning-fast playmaker Corbin Carroll, and run-producing masher Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

apps.title: Rainbow Six Mobile
apps.summary:
From the acclaimed Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six franchise, Rainbow Six Mobile is a competitive online tactical action shooter FPS built specifically for online mobile action. Engage in intense 5v5 multiplayer FPS matches inspired by Rainbow Six Siege’s iconic Attack vs. Defense gameplay. Alternate roles every round as you play Attacker or Defender in fast-paced online combat. Experience close-quarter shooter action where teamwork, positioning, and map knowledge make the difference. Choose from a roster of elite Operators from Rainbow Six Siege, each designed for action tactical team play with unique abilities and gadgets. Every map offers new strategic possibilities, demanding coordination, precision, and smart decisions.

Rainbow Six Mobile delivers a true FPS action shooter experience, adapted for mobile platforms.

MOBILE ADAPTATION – Rainbow Six Mobile has been developed and optimized for mobile devices, delivering smooth online gameplay, intuitive controls, and shorter 5v5 FPS matches. Customize your HUD, adjust controls to your playstyle, and jump into tactical combat anywhere, anytime. This mobile shooter supports responsive touch controls and controller compatibility for competitive action on the go.

RAINBOW SIX EXPERIENCE – Experience the authentic Rainbow Six Siege on mobile. Play on legendary maps such as Bank, Clubhouse, Border, Oregon, and Villa. Each map is designed for tactical team coordination and intense 5v5 online combat. Squad up with friends and players worldwide in thrilling multiplayer action FPS battles.

TACTICAL SHOOTER GAME – Rainbow Six Mobile, like Rainbow Six Siege, is an action-tactical shooter focused on realistic combat. Clear angles, gather intel with drones and cameras, and adapt your strategy to every map. Smart decisions, teamwork, and preparation are essential to dominate this online action FPS.

DESTRUCTIBLE ENVIRONMENTS – Use destruction to your advantage in close-quarter combat. Break walls, doors, and hatches to reshape the map and create new tactical opportunities. Every map becomes a dynamic battlefield where strategy and action collide in intense shooter gameplay.

STRATEGIC TEAM-BASED PVP – Strategy and teamwork are the keys to success in Rainbow Six Mobile. Adapt your strategy to each map, role, and situation in competitive 5v5 online combat. Attackers gather intel and breach defenses, while Defenders fortify positions and control the map. True tactical action shooter gameplay rewards communication and planning.

SPECIALIZED OPERATORS – Build your team with highly trained Operators from Rainbow Six Siege. Each Operator brings unique weapons, gadgets, and abilities to the battlefield. Mastering Operators is key to success in this competitive online shooter.

NEW MONTHLY SEASON – Every month, discover new action with fresh Operators, Battle Pass content, limited-time online modes, events, and cosmetics. Keep your team ready for evolving combat challenges across new and familiar maps.

This game requires an online connection (4G, 5G, or Wi-Fi).

apps.title: Immortal Clan: Grandmastery
apps.summary:
Immortal Clan: Grandmastery is an Eastern fantasy xiuxian simulation and management mobile game. Your journey takes place in a fantastical world ripped from the pages of a xiuxian novel. As the founding master, you will build your own sect from scratch. You will recruit disciples with distinct personalities and quirks, assign them to daily production tasks and guide their cultivation. Under your guidance, they will eventually transcend mortality and ascend to immortality. In this world, every character has the potential to be the protagonist. Best of all, resources could be passed down without any cost, ensuring an easy and fun cultivation experience!

Build your own sect from scratch
· Begin by claiming a wild, untamed mountain and building your sect with your bare hands.
· From building facilities and planning the overall layout of hundreds of constructions, you have total control over shaping the sect's destiny.
· Planting, mining, alchemy, crafting and all sorts of production yield help your sect flourish.

An Orthodox Xiuxian World of Eastern Fantasy
· Stepping into the grand world of eastern Xiuxian, you will take on the role of the sect's founding master and forge your path to becoming an unfading legend.
· The interplay of rival sects, untangled forces, and mysterious rifts creates a deeply immersive Xiuxian world.
· Dispatch your disciples across the world to explore ancient rifts, gather rare artifacts, and encounter the unknown.

A Highly Customized Disciple Cultivation System
· In this Xiuxian world, every disciple is a unique individual with distinct appearance, personality, quirks, and destiny.
· Disciples were shaped by their own traits: some were born fighters, while others excel at daily productions. The sect thrives only when you match each disciple's strengths to their perfect role.
· Even the most unassuming disciple could be of vital assistance if placed wisely. It all depends on your discerning eye.

A Choice-Driven Cultivation Process
· Cultivation is more than just stacking stats. In this game, you get to forge a completely unique path by experimenting with countless combinations of Techniques and Skills.
· There is no single set path. Guide your disciples to choose their own destiny—whether they walk the righteous Immortal Way or the ruthless Demonic Way.
· Progress need not be a grind. With the Impartation system, disciples can master new Techniques without losing hard-earned cultivation, eliminating the burden of starting over.

Fight for the Sect
· The law of the jungle reigns here! When conflict becomes inevitable, you must lead your disciples into battle against all foes.

· Battle roaming demonic monsters, powerful world bosses, rival sects, and the hidden forces of the dark demon realm.

apps.description:
Immortal Clan: Grandmastery is an Eastern fantasy xiuxian simulation and management mobile game. Your journey takes place in a fantastical world ripped from the pages of a xiuxian novel. As the founding master, you will build your own sect from scratch. You will recruit disciples with distinct personalities and quirks, assign them to daily production tasks and guide their cultivation. Under your guidance, they will eventually transcend mortality and ascend to immortality. In this world, every character has the potential to be the protagonist. Best of all, resources could be passed down without any cost, ensuring an easy and fun cultivation experience!

Build your own sect from scratch
· Begin by claiming a wild, untamed mountain and building your sect with your bare hands.
· From building facilities and planning the overall layout of hundreds of constructions, you have total control over shaping the sect's destiny.
· Planting, mining, alchemy, crafting and all sorts of production yield help your sect flourish.

An Orthodox Xiuxian World of Eastern Fantasy
· Stepping into the grand world of eastern Xiuxian, you will take on the role of the sect's founding master and forge your path to becoming an unfading legend.
· The interplay of rival sects, untangled forces, and mysterious rifts creates a deeply immersive Xiuxian world.
· Dispatch your disciples across the world to explore ancient rifts, gather rare artifacts, and encounter the unknown.

A Highly Customized Disciple Cultivation System
· In this Xiuxian world, every disciple is a unique individual with distinct appearance, personality, quirks, and destiny.
· Disciples were shaped by their own traits: some were born fighters, while others excel at daily productions. The sect thrives only when you match each disciple's strengths to their perfect role.
· Even the most unassuming disciple could be of vital assistance if placed wisely. It all depends on your discerning eye.

A Choice-Driven Cultivation Process
· Cultivation is more than just stacking stats. In this game, you get to forge a completely unique path by experimenting with countless combinations of Techniques and Skills.
· There is no single set path. Guide your disciples to choose their own destiny—whether they walk the righteous Immortal Way or the ruthless Demonic Way.
· Progress need not be a grind. With the Impartation system, disciples can master new Techniques without losing hard-earned cultivation, eliminating the burden of starting over.

Fight for the Sect
· The law of the jungle reigns here! When conflict becomes inevitable, you must lead your disciples into battle against all foes.
· Forge alliances with other players in this vast Xiuxian world. Your strategic choices will shape not only your sect's destiny but also the fate of others.
· Battle roaming demonic monsters, powerful world bosses, rival sects, and the hidden forces of the dark demon realm.
· Every victory brings glorious rewards—rare items, Artifacts and Gear. Fight for the glory of the sect!

apps.title: BagMaster Isekai – Bag Battle
apps.summary:
ATTENTION ADVENTURERS

One minute you’re just chilling, playing your favorite game, and then next suddenly you’re IN the game! Welcome to the world of isekai, where you, the player, get to experience being transported to a whole new world. Here you’ll be helping the local piggies defeat waves of enemies in this delightful turn-based RPG. Collect and merge items in your bag to create awesome weapons, explore dungeons and castles, battle bosses, and test your strategy skills: on your mark, get set, oink!

SURVIVAL OF THE SMARTEST

In this roguelike RPG, you’ll have a chance before each wave of enemies to try and max out your weapons by merging them and using synergy to create bigger, better, and badder equipment. You’ll also have a chance to pick which buff you want to add at the end of the battle, allowing you to create and build on a strategy. The fun never ends in this role playing isekai game as you also get to explore new territories and grow your character!

Fun features:

- Bag it up – A key mechanic of this turn-based role playing game is your backpack. Use it to both store your gear as well as merge individual pieces to create stronger weapons and equipment.

- Waves on waves of enemies – as all good tactical strategy games go, this one too features tons of waves of increasingly strong enemies and bosses for you to test your ideas and might out on. That also gives you a chance to change tactics if you feel like your survival is at risk! Between battles you can make little adjustments that will add up over time and help you win… if you’re smart.

- Turn based strategy – that’s right, all those little buffs and weapons merges will either help or hinder you, and there’s no way of knowing if you picked the right battle plan until you’re facing down a horde of bosses. That’s the true joy of this type of roguelike RPG game!

- Roguelike goodness – As you wipe out your enemies and fight for survival, have fun exploring the various levels and learning more about your new world. Navigate through the maze of monsters as you level up and get to know your piggy overlords. The roguelike mechanics will make this isekai role playing game feel familiar for fans of the genre, while also being accessible to newer players.

- Fun in the sun – despite all the strategizing and merging and fighting you’ll be doing, this game is still about having fun after all! Build out your character, explore new realms, and of course, enjoy the great graphics and sound effects. With short battle waves you can always find time to squeeze in a fight or two!

THE OINKIEST TACTICAL STRATEGY GAME

Come one, come all, and let yourselves be transported to an exciting new world thanks to this roguelike role playing game. Use your magical bag to create the ultimate weapons as you seek survival by making the right choices each round. Let the turn-based roguelike mechanics lead the way as you battle your way through this dungeon crawler tactical strategy game and prove your might.

Privacy Policy: https://say.games/privacy-policy
Terms of Use: https://say.games/terms-of-use

apps.title: The Urban Rewind
apps.summary:
The Urban Rewind is a timed, multiple-choice trivia game centered on music and pop culture. Players test their knowledge across entertainment categories while managing a virtual currency system (“Mics”), unlocking achievements, and progressing through tiered levels.

Categories & Access

At launch, players have access to:
* Hip-Hop
* R&B

The TV and Movies categories are visible but locked, indicated with a lock icon.

Players begin with 3 Mics. Locked categories and additional Mics can be purchased via in-app purchases. Tapping a locked category or “Buy Mics” opens the checkout interface with the correct product and pricing.

On successful purchase:
* Mic balances or category access update immediately.
* If a category is unlocked, the user is automatically taken to that category’s “Good Luck” screen.
On failed or canceled transactions:
* The user returns to the previous screen.
* No changes are made to access or Mic balance.

Players can assign purchased Mics to specific categories from the Play screen. During active gameplay, Mics default to the current category but may be adjusted.

Gameplay & Mic Rules

Each session presents one question at a time with four answer choices (A/B/C/D). After selecting an answer, players receive immediate feedback (“Correct” or “Incorrect”) along with explanatory text.

Mics function as the attempt system:
* A player is not considered to have lost while 1 Mic remains.
* If prompted to purchase Mics at this stage, the gameplay timer resets to 10 seconds once the prompt is accepted or dismissed.
A loss occurs only when the Mic count reaches 0.
* When this happens, the session ends and a Results screen is displayed.
* If a user purchases Mics after reaching 0, they cannot resume the ended session. They must restart the category from 0 correct answers (clean restart), though they may restart within their highest unlocked level band.
* After purchasing Mics following a loss, users are redirected to the Home screen.

Leveling & Progression
Each category features a cumulative badge system. All badges are grayed out at the start.

Level thresholds:
* Gold: 15 correct answers
* Platinum: 20 additional correct answers
* Multi-Platinum: 25 additional correct answers
* Diamond: 30 additional correct answers

Levels must be completed sequentially.

Once Diamond is achieved:
* The category is considered complete.
* The user is routed back to the beginning to replay the category.
* The Diamond badge remains visible until Gold is reached again during replay.

The highest level achieved in each category is permanently recorded. If a user exits or loses, they resume from the difficulty band of their highest unlocked level rather than starting from the beginning.

Audio & Sponsor Integration

Sponsor-provided background music (Artist + Title) plays on:
* Splash screen
* Login screen
* Rules screen
* Category selection screen

Music is ON by default when the app launches or when returning to the main screen. Users may tap a track to open an external link (e.g., Spotify or social media) in their browser.

During gameplay:
* Correct and Incorrect sound effects play for every question.
* On level-up, a dedicated Level-Up sound plays, and background music is temporarily paused.

UI & Session Management
Before starting any category, users see a “Good Luck” screen displaying their current level.

If a user leaves mid-session, the app saves:
* Question index
* Mic count
* Progress

Upon returning, users are prompted to Continue or Start Over.

A Results screen appears when:
* The user exits,
* A level threshold is reached, or
* Mics reach 0.

The Results screen displays total correct and incorrect answers, Mic changes, and the next milestone required for level advancement.

apps.title: Arrow Out: Line Puzzle
apps.summary:
Are you ready to test your logic? 👉 Tap to Release!

Welcome to Arrow Out: Line Puzzle, the addictive new brain teaser that challenges you to think outside the box! The board is jammed with tangled arrows, and it’s your job to help them escape.

How to Play:

Tap the arrows to move them forward in the direction they point.

Watch out! Arrows will stop if they hit another block.

Plan your moves: Find the right order to clear the screen without collisions.

Clear the level: Remove all arrows to win!

It starts easy, but as you progress, the puzzles become complex knots of logic that will put your IQ to the test. It’s like a traffic jam, but with satisfying, clean lines!

Key Features:

🧠 Brain-Training Gameplay: Hundreds of levels designed to sharpen your spatial reasoning and critical thinking.

👆 Simple Controls: Just tap to play! Easy to learn, but hard to master.

🎨 Clean & Relaxing: Minimalist design with smooth animations for a satisfying, stress-free experience.

🚀 Escalating Difficulty: From simple clear-outs to complex, multi-layered jams.

🚫 No Time Limits: Play at your own pace. Perfect for a quick break or a long commute.

Can you untangle the mess and clear the board? Download Arrow Out: Line Puzzle now and start tapping!

apps.title: Arrow Puzzle - Arrow Madness
apps.summary:
Welcome to Arrow Madness - the addictive FREE arrow puzzle game designed to test your logic. Experience the ultimate arrows puzzle escape challenge in a stunning neon world! 

This isn't just a simple tap game - it is a top-tier brain game that combines the addictive mechanics of snake puzzles with classic block escape strategies. If you are looking for puzzle games for adults that truly test your spatial thinking, you have found the perfect match. Tap away arrows, untangle snake-like knots, and clear the arrow maze in this satisfying logic quest!

🌟 HOW TO PLAY: MASTER THE ARROW GAME
↪️ TAP & RELEASE: Tap an arrow to make it fly away. But be careful - arrows only move in one direction!

↪️ ZOOM & SCAN: Use the Zoom feature to inspect tight spots and find the arrows buried deep in the chaos.

↪️ USE THE GRID: Toggle the Grid Lines to align your view and plan your arrows puzzle escape with precision.

↪️ PLAN YOUR ESCAPE: Find the right order. Remove the outer layer first to clear the path and get every arrow out.

🌟 WHY YOU WILL LOVE ARROW MADNESS
🧠 Challenging Arrow Puzzle Games for Adults 
Prepare for a real mental test in this brain game. We offer handcrafted special levels and complex knots that require deep critical thinking. It is a cognitive workout designed to boost your IQ.

🎨 Stunning Neon Arrow Art 
Enjoy a clean, minimalist aesthetic with glowing neon lines on a dark background. It's easy on the eyes and perfect for night play.

😌 Satisfying Tap Away Mechanics 
There is nothing more satisfying than watching the board clear up. Fans of snake puzzles or block escape games will love the unique twist of this arrow game.

🧘 Relaxing Flow & NO TIMER 
Stress-free gaming at its best! Perfect for your daily commute, a coffee break, or winding down before bed. This arrow puzzle is your go-to companion for moments of focus and calm.

🔍 Zoom & Grid Assistance 
Don't let complex shapes stop you! Use our Grid Assistance and Zoom tools to see every detail and solve even the hardest and trickiest brain puzzles.

🚀 1000+ Creative Arrow Levels 
You never know what comes next! From abstract art to complex labyrinths, enjoy the surprise of unlocking unique shapes in your tap away journey.

❓ FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS (FAQ)

Q: What kind of game is Arrow Madness?
A: It is a beautiful arrows puzzle escape game. You tap away arrows to untangle complex, snake-like knots, combining spatial logic with satisfying mechanics.

A: No! Arrow Madness is a completely stress-free brain game with NO timers. You can relax, take your time, and enjoy the logic quest at your own pace.

A: Absolutely. It is specifically designed as a challenging cognitive workout for adults. The deep spatial thinking required makes it the perfect brain teaser.

Don't let the tangle fool you - with the right strategy, every arrow has a way out. Download now and see how many levels you can untangle. Can you clear the grid and become the ultimate arrow game master?

👉 Tap away the chaos today!

apps.title: Word Association Tiles
apps.summary:
Word Association Tiles is a fast-thinking puzzle game that challenges your brain with clear, confident logic at every step. Each level presents a grid of word and image tiles that demand decisive thinking as you identify strong connections, group them correctly, and clear the board. The rules are simple, the goal is clear, and every correct move delivers an immediate sense of progress and control.

This game is built around precision and certainty. There is no guessing, no ambiguity, and no waiting around. Every puzzle has clean solutions that reward sharp observation and strong pattern recognition. With thousands of carefully structured levels, Word Association Tiles constantly pushes your cognitive skills forward while staying smooth, focused, and deeply satisfying to play.

Features
• 10,000+ structured levels designed for logical clarity and decisive gameplay
• Strong, unmistakable word and image associations that feel intuitive and rewarding
• Clean, bold visuals that keep your attention on the puzzle
• Brain-training gameplay that strengthens reasoning, memory, and focus
• Clear objectives and fast feedback on every move
• Seamless progression that keeps momentum high

How to Play
Look at the tiles and identify groups that share a clear, meaningful connection. Tap to select matching tiles and form a complete set. Correct groups are removed instantly, bringing you closer to finishing the level. Clear all groups to win and move forward. As levels advance, the associations become tighter and more demanding, requiring confident thinking and quick decisions.

Download Word Association Tiles and experience a puzzle game built around clarity, confidence, and smart connections.

apps.title: Vigor Solitaire for Seniors

Vigor Solitaire is an Exclusive Classic Solitaire Game for Senior Citizens. With large cards and an eye-friendly easy-to-use interface, this game is the best way to play the CLASSIC card game you know and love for FREE, offline and online!

The addictive game you’ve been playing on your computer for years, classic Solitaire, also known as Patience, now goes wherever you do. Vigor Solitaire is the ideal app for the best casual gaming experience that will help you recharge your batteries and sharpen your mind!

How to Play:
Just tap or drag cards to arrange them in descending order with alternating number, colors and suits. When you can, move cards to the foundation to sort all suits from Ace to King. Only a King or a pile starting with a King can be placed in an empty space on the Solitaire Tableau. You can play it your way, with a 1 card or 3 card draw, and choose between classic or Vegas scoring.

Exclusive Features:
- Classic Solitaire: staying true to the original gameplay
- Unlimited deck of cards: There are always a new patience solitaire card game to play
- Large Card Design: Our solitaire game features large, easily readable font sizes to alleviate the strain caused by small numbers
- Fun daily challenges: Win a gift simply for showing up
- Draw one card at a time for relax, or draw three for challenge
- Unlimited free hints and free undos to help you in the card game
- Various backgrounds and card decks for a personalized experience
- Custom Settings: Choose between portrait or landscape mode and select from a range of styles
- Rewards for Every Game: Earn points every time you play to unlock free rewards
- Leaderboards & Statistics: See how you stack up against other players, or try to beat your own high score

apps.title: Cross World: Word Riddles
apps.developer: Quiz & Trivia Games by Mno Go Apps
apps.summary:
Welcome to Cross World - a modern take on crossword trivia games!
If you love solving puzzles, testing your knowledge, and training your brain with word games, this app is made for you. Cross World combines the classic crossword puzzle format with exciting trivia quiz questions, creating a unique challenge you won’t find anywhere else.

What makes Cross World different?
Unlike traditional crossword apps, every clue in Cross World is a trivia question. To fill in the grid, you don’t just guess words - you prove your knowledge across history, science, movies, sports, geography, and more. It’s the perfect mix of a quiz game and a word puzzle adventure.

Why you’ll love it:
- Thousands of clever trivia questions designed to challenge your memory and logic.
- A mix of text + picture questions that make every puzzle unique.
- Crosswords that grow more fun and rewarding with every solved riddle.
- A brain teaser experience that’s relaxing yet stimulating.
- The option to use clues when puzzles get tricky.
- A colorful, friendly interface for enjoyable play anytime.
- Earn stars and coins as you play and unlock levels.
- Daily crossword challenges to keep your mind sharp.

Boost your brainpower & vocabulary
Cross World is more than just a word game. It’s a daily habit to train your brain, expand your general knowledge, and enrich your vocabulary while having fun. Every crossword is a chance to learn something surprising!

Travel the world of words
From quick mini-puzzles to big challenges, every level is a journey. Solve word riddles, unlock achievements, and see how far your knowledge takes you.

Get started today!
Dive into the ultimate mix of crosswords and trivia quizzes. Whether you play for relaxation, education, or a competitive challenge, you’ll always find something exciting here.

Cross World is the smart way to have fun!

apps.summary:
Step into a world of tranquil card play with Calm Solitaire. This is the classic Solitaire you know, reimagined as a peaceful retreat for your mind. Designed with soothing visuals, relaxing interactions, and a stress-free environment, it’s the perfect way to unwind, focus, and enjoy a moment for yourself. Fully playable offline and tailored for every screen.

A Truly Peaceful Experience
• Easy on the Eyes: Enjoy carefully designed, large cards, clear fonts, and soft, calming color themes that make every game session a visual comfort.
• Faithful and Pure: We’ve kept the classic Klondike rules intact, free from distracting ads or cluttered layouts. It’s just you and the cards.
• Mindful Mental Exercise: Perfect for daily brain training. Quietly enhance your memory, strategic thinking, and patience as you play and decompress.

• Seamless on Any Device: Experience perfect gameplay on smartphones, tablets, and foldables of any size.
• Evolving Tranquility: Look forward to regular updates that bring fresh, calming themes and new ways to play to your collection.

Find Your Focus with Every Deal
Whether you're seeking a nostalgic pastime or a new ritual for mental wellness, Calm Solitaire turns a spare minute into a rewarding opportunity for focus and calm.

Download our Calm Solitaire Now and Embrace the Peace!

apps.title: Pixel Blast: Robot Shooter
apps.summary:
THE FACTORY IS RUNNING. YOUR ROBOTS ARE READY.

Welcome to Pixel Blast — a color puzzle shooter built around one brutal, satisfying loop: deploy factory robots, blast matching pixel cubes off the assembly grid, and clear the board before the line jams.

Your bots don't mess around. They're loaded, color-coded, and ready to fire.

── HOW IT WORKS ──

Your robot shooters wait in the factory bay — each one armed with its own color charge. Launch a bot onto the conveyor and it automatically blasts every matching pixel cube in its path. The board is a grid of colored blocks. Your robots are the solution.

Manage the queue. Time your deployments. Chain your shots to demolish entire color zones at once.

One wrong sequence jams the machine. Five robots in the bay. One conveyor. Thousands of combinations.

Simple to pick up. Hard to put down.

── FEATURES ──

🤖 Factory robot shooters — Each bot is color-coded, locked, and ready to fire

⚙️ Conveyor line system — Queue your robots, control the order, clear the grid

🎯 Precision color blasting — Robots only fire at their matching color — every shot is intentional

⚡ One-tap controls — Deploy, aim, and blast with a single tap

🏭 Thousands of levels — Every stage is a new factory puzzle to dismantle block by block

💥 Chain reactions — Clear one color zone and watch the cascade wipe the board clean

🔩 No timers, no rush — Strategy and precision beat speed every time

── THE CHALLENGE ──

Early shifts are straightforward — the grid is manageable, the colors are few. Push further and the assembly boards grow wider, the color combos get denser, and the conveyor margin for error shrinks to nothing.

Every level is an engineering problem. Analyze the board. Sequence your bots correctly. Execute the perfect run.

Master the factory. Master the blast.

── MADE FOR ──

✔ Quick sessions — one grid, one clear, one win

✔ Fans of color-match and cube puzzle games

✔ Players who love watching a chaotic board go completely clean

✔ Anyone who wants satisfying one-tap action without the noise

Pixel Blast is free to download and play. No Wi-Fi required. Short sessions, maximum payoff.

🏭 Report for duty. Blast away. Leave no cube standing.

apps.title: Dice Tac Toe
apps.summary:
Tic Tac Toe evolved! Roll the dice, pick your spot, and outsmart your rivals.

Think you know Tic Tac Toe? Think again.

Dice-Tac-Toe takes the world’s most famous game and injects it with a high-stakes tactical twist. This isn’t just about making a line; it’s about managing luck, calculating risk, and mastering the roll of the dice.

Step onto the massive 6x6 grid and prepare for a battle where every move is a decision and every roll could change the game.

The Classic Game, Reimagined

Forget the 3x3 grid. In Dice-Tac-Toe, the board is bigger, the stakes are higher, and the strategy is deeper. You don't just place your mark—you ROLL for it.

Why You’ll Love Dice-Tac-Toe:
- Strategy Meets Luck: Roll two dice to determine your coordinates. Do you take the safe spot or Re-roll for a game-changing play?
- Deep Tactical Gameplay: Use the 6x6 grid to block your opponent, set up massive combos, and score multiple points in a single turn.
- Unique Power-Ups: Not happy with your roll? Use Re-rolls to turn a "Bust" into a victory.
- Meet Sophie: Let your pro guide, Sophie, show you the ropes before you head into competitive play.
- Compete & Conquer: Face off in fast-paced matches where the first to score 3 wins the glory.
- Progresion & Rewards: Level up, earn gems, and unlock exclusive content as you climb the ranks.

How to Play:
- Roll: Shake the dice to get your Row and Column numbers.

apps.title: Jigsawcard Palace Gallery
apps.summary:
Jigsawcard Palace Gallery — Immersive Eastern Imperial Artifact Exhibition

Step into a treasure-filled world of ancient Eastern palaces! In Jigsawcard Palace Gallery, you will flip, slide, match, and assemble pieces to restore magnificent artifacts that carry centuries of history. This game beautifully blends the thoughtful challenge of traditional jigsaw puzzles with smooth card-swiping mechanics, while hidden stories on the back of each card reveal fascinating historical insights—offering a cultural journey that is both peaceful and intellectually engaging, merging memory skills with rich heritage.

How to Play:
- Just press and drag any cards anywhere
- Match & connect pieces to finish the puzzles
- Observe every details and plan your moves wisely to clear the board

Key Features:
- HD Artifacts: Porcelain, jade, calligraphy, bronze ware, and more—premium visuals bring Eastern palace treasures to life
- Satisfying Restoration: Experience the joy of piecing together multiple fragments into complete objects, just like a real conservator
- Hidden Historical Facts—Each card back holds a story or detail, creating a rewarding memory challenge that also educates
- No Time Limits, No Pressure—A relaxing experience suitable for all ages and skill levels
- Gradual Depth: Start with single artifacts and progress to full exhibition halls, with increasing complexity for seasoned players
- Unlock Themed Galleries: Ceramics Hall, Clock & Watch Pavilion, Painting Gallery… keep your journey fresh and inspiring

Perfect For:
- Fans of jigsaw puzzles, card-matching, and historical puzzles, or anyone who enjoys a creative blend of culture and gameplay
- Players looking for a relaxing yet deeply rewarding pastime with a sense of accomplishment
- Those who appreciate beautiful visuals and want to engage their minds while exploring Eastern imperial artistry

Jigsawcard Palace Gallery is more than a game—it’s a hands-on restoration of history, a moment of mindful calm, and a celebration of timeless Eastern craftsmanship. Flip, slide, and connect exquisite artifact fragments to feel the warmth of history and complete your own cultural exhibition, one gentle tap at a time.

Download now and join a global community of puzzle and culture lovers in this beautifully crafted fusion of jigsaw challenge and historical discovery!

Welcome to Arrows GO! A clean arrows puzzle escape built to calm a busy mind. Your goal is simple: guide each arrow out without a collision. - Works offline with quick loading and a clean interface that keeps attention on arrows

- Works offline with quick loading and a clean interface that keeps attention on arrows

apps.title: Arrow Rescue: Save the Animal

Arrow Rescue: Save the Animal is a satisfying arrow puzzle game where strategy meets heartwarming animal rescue. Clear the right arrows, open the correct paths, and guide every trapped animal safely out of the maze!
Simple to play, challenging to master — every move matters.

🧠 Think Smart, Move Smart
Each level is a carefully designed arrow puzzle.
Tap arrows in the correct order to clear the maze and create a safe escape route.
But be careful — one wrong move can block the path!
As you progress, puzzles become more complex, requiring logic, timing, and strategic thinking. There’s no rush, so take your time and plan the perfect solution.

🐶 Rescue Adorable Animals
Cute animals are trapped inside tricky mazes — and they’re counting on you!

apps.title: Rogue Legend - Roguelike RPG
apps.summary:
Embark on an action roguelike RPG adventure with Rogue Legend, where every battle makes your hero stronger.
In Rogue Legend, you journey through worlds filled with monsters, treasures, and powerful bosses. Each run is a new roguelike RPG experience of strategy, combat, and growth, giving you the chance to strengthen your hero and push further with every run.

Enter a World of Endless Battles:
Every session begins in the lobby. Press Play and roll the dice to start your roguelike RPG run, diving into a board-based action RPG full of encounters and surprises. As your hero moves across the board, different events unfold depending on where you land:
* Enemy Tiles: Engage in fast, automatic roguelike RPG battles. After each fight, choose one of three upgrades to shape your build.
* Buff Tiles: Gain boosts to attack, defense, and speed to help your hero survive longer in Rogue Legend’s idle-friendly dungeons.
* Negative Tiles: Face debuffs that test your timing and strategic decisions.
* Minigame Tiles: Roll for luck in short events where you can win extra loot or power-ups.
* Shop Tiles: Spend gold to buy new gear, upgrades, and legendary equipment.
* Special Tiles: Additional tile types will be added over time to expand Rogue Legend’s gameplay depth.

Defeat Bosses and Grow Stronger:
Your goal is to survive, adapt, and conquer every boss battle. Each fight is an opportunity to grow stronger, unlocking new roguelike RPG challenges, rewards, and abilities that prepare your hero for the next run in this idle RPG adventure.

Upgrade, Progress, and Customize Your Hero:
Between runs, return to the lobby to enhance your hero through Rogue Legend’s RPG progression systems:
* Gear System: Collect and upgrade your weapons, armor, and equipment.
* Talent System: Level up to unlock new stats, passive abilities, and bonuses that fit your playstyle.
* Pet System: Obtain and train pets that join you in combat (coming soon).

Roguelike Depth with Idle RPG Progression
Rogue Legend blends the excitement of roguelike gameplay with the satisfaction of RPG and idle progression. Each run feels fast, rewarding, and different. The board and dice mechanics make every move matter, while the idle RPG design ensures steady progress without repetitive grind.

A Journey of Strategy and Power:
If you enjoy roguelike action, RPG adventure, and idle gameplay, Rogue Legend delivers a journey of endless replayability.
⚔️ Fight, roll, and rise again in Rogue Legend, the roguelike idle RPG where every battle shapes your hero’s fate.

One sanctuary. One doctor. One last chance.
A mysterious plague has swept across the world, leaving chaos in its wake. As a plague doctor, you become the town's final beacon of hope. Build and manage a sanctuary, heal those you can, and guide your people through the darkest days of the pandemic. Your strategy will shape their future.

Run your sanctuary as the last refuge against the plague.

Create the best lineup of different types of heroes. Outsmart contenders on the battlefield. Gain control of crucial cities. Expand your territory in this world.

apps.title: BALL x PIT
apps.summary:
BALL x PIT is a brick-breaking, ball-fusing, base-building survival roguelite. Batter hordes of enemies with ricocheting balls and gather the riches of the pit to expand your homestead, generate resources and recruit unique heroes.

BALL x PIT is a fast-paced fantasy roguelite where heroes must find the balls to plunge deeper into a seemingly bottomless pit of monsters. Develop arcane ammunition and resources in pursuit of treasure, recruiting additional heroes to aid you in your perilous quest.

Ballbylon has fallen. After a meteoric and completely unexpected event annihilated the great city, all that remains is an ominous, yawning pit. Treasure hunters from far and wide flock to the city’s tomb to seek their fortune, plumbing the depths in search of Ballbylon’s scattered riches. Few return.

The pit plays host to armies of barbaric creatures, hellbent on ending your quest before it even begins. Armed with a growing arsenal of magic-infused projectiles, batter your way through multiple levels of increasingly challenging obstacles to claim the ultimate prizes and rebuild New Ballbylon.

Fuse Your Balls
The Ball Fusion system encourages explosive experimentation with over 60 randomized balls to equip and combine during your journey. Discover overpowered combinations and unexpected synergies from hundreds of possible outcomes.

Build New Ballbylon
Expand New Ballbylon with over 70 unique buildings that provide gameplay bonuses and unlock further power-ups, new characters, and more! As your community grows, task homebound heroes with automated tasks to keep the resources coming while you dive deeper into the pit.

Discover New Realms
Face legions of diverse enemies within the pit, battling through barren deserts, frozen caverns, savage forests and more. Each region offers its own unique set of hazards on top of hordes of increasingly challenging foes and mighty, screen-filling bosses.

Recruit Fellow Hunters
As you explore the pit you’ll encounter fellow treasure hunters eager to add their skills to your expedition. Each character has unique, upgradable mechanics that totally change the way you play the game. Experimentation and adaptation are crucial to the success of New Ballbylon!

apps.summary:

Dive into a surreal ocean abyss in an atmospheric puzzle-adventure. Explore dangerous waters, possess sea creatures and solve environmental puzzles to discover what lies deep below the surface…

SILT is a surreal underwater puzzle-adventure game. Alone in an underwater abyss, you are a diver searching the deep to uncover long-forgotten mysteries.
Possess the creatures around you to solve puzzles and travel further into the darkness…

Nature has evolved into bizarre forms. Discover strange organisms, unexplored ruins and ancient machinery hidden beneath the water’s surface.

Survive encounters with giant deep-sea goliaths. Harness their power to awaken a long-dormant force at the centre of the abyss.

Experience art brought to life. SILT’s unsettling, monochrome world is constructed from the sketches and dark imagination of artist Mr Mead. A harrowing journey awaits you…

EPILEPSY WARNING

Some people are susceptible to epileptic seizures or loss of consciousness when exposed to certain flashing lights and moving patterns in everyday life. If you or anyone in your family has ever had symptoms related to epilepsy (seizures or loss of consciousness) when exposed to flashing lights or moving patterns, consult your doctor prior to playing this game. If you or your family experience any symptoms of seizure while playing this game, such as dizziness, nausea, or loss of consciousness, stop playing immediately and seek medical attention.

apps.title: Cozy Ropes: Relaxing Knitting
apps.summary:
CONNECT THE DOTS: KNITTING EDITION
When life’s got you down and you’re feeling stressed out, what better way to make things right than to reach for your favorite cozy relaxing knitting puzzle and partake in a few puzzle solving game levels? Cozy Ropes is a satisfying ASMR game where you connect dots with rope to form colors and shapes that will come together and reveal a hidden puzzle. Your mood is sure to lighten as you make your way from dot to dot in this cheerful puzzle solving game!

COLORS AND SHAPES AND PUZZLES, OH MY!
Each level consists of a hidden puzzle, your job is to connect the dots based on how many pieces of rope you need, thus forming colorful geometric shapes that soon reveal the picture within. This satisfying logic puzzle is heavy on the relaxation aspect, so take your time trying various combos with no penalties.

Get ready for:
- Satisfying ASMR gameplay– if you’re a fan of fun noises and haptic effects you’ll love this logic puzzle! For those who just want to connect dots peacefully feel free to just toggle on the music, or even play in total silence.
