apps.title: Hatch Dragons
apps.summary:
Discover Dragons like you’ve never seen before! Collect and care for hundreds of unique Dragons, uncovering their origins as they grow. From playful Cat Dragons to rare Bluebell Dragons, every new Dragon you hatch and raise brings this cozy, peaceful world to life.

Long ago, Dragons filled this enchanted forest, thriving alongside nature. Each evolved into forms as diverse as the surrounding flora and fauna. Some shimmered with glittering scales, others were soft and furry, and some even bloomed with flowers or mushrooms.

When nearby mining drove the Dragons away, fog crept in and the forest fell silent for years. Now, join Liv the Elf to lift the fog, summon the Dragons home, and help the forest sparkle with life once more.

GAME HIGHLIGHTS
✨ Summon Dragons: Help Liv mix elements, gems, and more to call Dragons of all shapes, forms, and rarities to your forest.
💖 Raise Dragons: Hatch eggs, feed your Dragons, and help them grow into magical, bonded companions.
📖 Collect Hundreds of Dragons: Discover a magical array of Dragons that evolved alongside nature.
🔮 Uncover Lore: Reveal charming legends and little-known facts about your Dragons.
🌲 Explore and Restore: Clear the fog and help the forest awaken with life, magic, and folkloric friends.
🍄 Decorate Your Forest: Adorn your forest with plants and decor that possess magical abilities to help you progress.
🎁 Missions and Events: Missions, updates, and limited-time events bring exciting new Dragons, décor, and rewards. There’s always something new to discover!

If you love Dragons, cozy collection games, and relaxing adventures, you will be enchanted by Hatch Dragons.

*****
Hatch Dragons is developed and published by Runaway.
This game is free to play but does contain in-app purchases. If you run into any issues while playing or you have any suggestions, please reach out to us at support@runaway.zendesk.com

apps.title: Arrow Game: Color Escape
apps.summary:
Arrow Game: Color Escape is a relaxing arrows puzzle escape game with a minimalistic style for pure relaxation

With simple gameplay, your goal in the Arrow Game: Color Escape is to tap and guide colorful arrows through the maze, solving directional paths to help every color arrow find its way out. Each level is a compact arrow maze filled with colorful twists and turns. So, plan your moves carefully, untangle crowded paths, and find the perfect order to escape. Tap the arrows out to clear blocked routes and free each one, creating a deeply satisfying puzzle experience that's perfect for unwinding your mind.

This is a relaxing arrows puzzle escape experience designed for players who love calm, thoughtful challenges. Easy to learn, endlessly satisfying to master.

How to Play:
- Find the correct order to move arrows
- Tap along their directions to help all the arrows escape the maze
- Free all the color arrows to complete the puzzle escape

Arrow Game Features
- Addictive arrows puzzle escape levels with evolving mechanics, starting with a few color lines & quickly evolving into a huge arrow maze to unpuzzle
- Relaxing and stress-free gameplay with no timer, no pressure. Just chill & unwind with arrow escape
- Clean minimalist visuals with colorful directional arrow puzzle design with smooth animations
- Smart brain games that sharpen logic and problem-solving
- Offline game allows enjoying this arrow puzzle anytime, even without wifi
- Helpful hints and boosters when puzzles get tricky

Whether you play for a few minutes or enjoy a long, relaxing session, Arrow Game: Color Escape is the perfect color puzzle to calm your mind and train your brain. Tap and escape, just relax as it is

apps.title: Cold War Z RPG
apps.summary:
Cold War Z RPG is a post-apocalyptic idle RPG battler set in a brutal world after the Cold War collapsed into chaos.
Zombies roam the land, mutants hunt in the shadows, and survivors fight each other for resources. Your path, your choices, and your morality define who you become.

☢️ CHOOSE YOUR PATH

Travel through dangerous locations by choosing your route.
Each path leads to different encounters:

Zombie hordes

Mutants and elite enemies

Other survivors — friend or foe

Hidden chests and rare loot

⚖️ MORAL CHOICES MATTER

Meet survivors on your journey and decide their fate:

Help them and gain allies

Kill them and loot their gear

Trade items or deceive them

Your decisions affect progression, rewards, and the world around you.

🧠 IDLE BATTLE SYSTEM

Progress even when you’re offline

Automatic combat with strategic ability usage

Activate powerful skills at key moments

Perfect for both active and idle playstyles

🗡️ DEEP RPG PROGRESSION

Massive item system with rarity tiers

Weapons, armor, and artifacts with multiple stats

Build your character your way: damage, defense, crits, survival

Optimize builds for bosses, PvE, and long runs

👹 BOSSES & ENEMIES

Fight against:

Zombies and mutated horrors

Hostile survivors

Powerful bosses guarding valuable rewards

Each enemy type requires a different approach.

🎒 LOOT, TRADE & SURVIVE

Open chests and discover rare items

Trade with NPCs

Manage inventory and optimize stats

Risk everything for better rewards

🌍 FEATURES

✔ Idle RPG with active abilities
✔ Moral choice system
✔ Multiple enemy factions
✔ Deep loot & stat system
✔ Boss fights
✔ Offline progression
✔ Dark post-apocalyptic atmosphere

Survive the ruins of a world destroyed by fear, power, and war.
In Cold War Z RPG, every step forward is a risk — and every choice has a price.

apps.title: Merge Cruise: Mystery Puzzle
apps.summary:
🚢 Embark on a thrilling merging, puzzling, and matching adventure with Merge Cruise: Mystery Puzzle!
Set sail on a captivating journey across exotic islands, where every merge unlocks hidden treasures and reveals intriguing mysteries waiting to be solved.

Merge Cruise: Mystery Puzzle! offers a unique blend of merging gameplay and adventurous quests, perfect for players of all ages. Dive into immersive landscapes, explore ancient ruins, and encounter fascinating characters along the way.

With stunning visuals, captivating soundtracks, and addictive gameplay mechanics, Merge Cruise delivers an unforgettable experience that will keep you engaged for hours on end. Whether you're a puzzle enthusiast or an adventure seeker, there's something for everyone in Merge Cruise!

🔎 Game Features:
🧩 Merge and Match: Generate and merge items on the board to complete tasks and earn cash. Discover a variety of items to create and merge.
🛠️ Renovate and Decorate: Use your hard-earned cash to renovate your cruise ship. Clean, fix, build, and decorate your way through each chapter, transforming your ship from run-down to luxurious.
📚 Engaging Storyline: Immerse yourself in a rich narrative filled with humor, drama, and mystery. Interact with a cast of colorful characters, each with their own unique personalities and secrets.
🎮 Unique Gameplay Modes: Choose from three gameplay modes, each offering a different experience. Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned puzzler, there's a mode for you.
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Diverse Cast of Characters: Interact with a spectrum of characters, each bringing their unique story and secrets to the fold.
🌎 Themes of Legacy and Community: Explore narratives of legacy, identity, and belonging, all woven into the fabric of a compelling mystery.
🆕 Regular Updates: With new chapters, items, and events added regularly, there's always something new to discover in Merge Cruise.

Set sail on a puzzle adventure like no other! Start merging, matching, and adventuring your way to victory today! Download Merge Cruise now and discover the excitement that awaits you on the high seas!

apps.title: Ice Haven
apps.summary:
The world as we knew it has ended. A catastrophic freeze swept across the planet, bringing civilization to its knees. From the frozen ruins, the dead began to rise, driven by an insatiable hunger and immune to the cold that kills the living. Now, scattered groups of survivors drift across the icy wasteland, scavenging for resources and fighting to see another dawn. In this brutal new world where warmth is precious and trust is rare, only the strongest and wisest leaders will endure.

As the leader of a small settlement adrift on a floating ice platform, you must rescue survivors, recruit powerful heroes, and build a stronghold capable of withstanding both the relentless cold and the zombie hordes that threaten to consume everything.

Ice Haven is a game of survival, strategy, and determination. Every decision shapes your settlement's fate and your people's hope for the future. Will you focus on fortifying your defenses against the zombie sieges, or will you venture into the frozen wilderness to uncover the secrets behind the apocalypse? Do you have what it takes to become humanity's last hope?

GAME FEATURES

Build a Floating Ice Fortress: Construct and upgrade a variety of survival facilities on your drifting ice platform. Manage resources, maintain warmth, and create a thriving refuge that stands as a beacon of hope in the apocalypse.

Rescue and House Survivors: Venture into the frozen wasteland to rescue stranded survivors. Bring them back to your settlement, where they will contribute their skills to help your community grow and prosper against all odds.

Recruit Legendary Heroes: Gather a roster of powerful heroes among the hardened soldiers, resourceful scouts, brilliant engineers, and more. Promote and equip them with specialized equipment to lead your forces to victory.

Defend Against the Undead: Fortify your defenses and repel waves of zombie attacks. Deploy defensive structures, plan tactical formations, and protect your people from the endless hordes that emerge from the blizzard.

Forge Powerful Alliances: Team up with players worldwide to form unbreakable coalitions. Share resources, coordinate large-scale attacks, and defend each other's territories in epic real-time PvP warfare.


SPECIAL NOTES

· Network connection is required.
· Privacy Policy: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/
· Terms of Use: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/terms_of_use
